description: Minimal frost probe: one audible source tone with a single frost iteration so the replayed seed and the two edge voices are easy to hear.

phrases.comment: A single plain seed tone. frost_effect preserves this source note and appends one local frost bloom after it.

score_transforms.comment: One frost iteration from a single seed tone so the replayed note plus upper and lower edge voices are easy to distinguish.
score_transforms.name: frost_effect
